TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: balad : śī™śįī / balad han ku tabakiay a likid nu nanum. nilacul siwkay nu balad u balad sa, u lahad a balasi'. tabaki ku nanum, matumes tu ku sa'wac. paelul tu niyazu' atu tademaw. anu maudad caay kasatezep, mabulad tu. anu tayni ku balius, mabulad tu. matalaw tu balad ku tademaw. mapeci' tu luma' atu nipaluma. tinaku a kamu mabalad śī™śįīśįĺśŅę / mabalad maenep ku niyazu'. mabaladay śī™śįīśįĺśŅęÁöĄ / mabaladay ku niyazu' nu Maibul. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A flood is an overflow of water that submerges land that is usually dry. The European Union Floods Directive defines a flood as a covering by water of land not normally covered by water. In the sense of "flowing water", the word may also be applied to the inflow of the tide.
S.PHON: bar~…ĺad : ** / bar~…ĺad ńßan ku tabakiaj a r~…ĺikid nu nanum. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ siwkaj nu bar~…ĺad u bar~…ĺad sa, u r~…ĺańßad a bar~…ĺasi Ē~ °. tabaki ku nanum, matum…ôs tu ku sa Ē~ °wa ¶. pa…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nijazu Ē~ ° atu tad…ômaw. anu maudad ¶aaj kasat…ôz…ôp, mabur~…ĺad tu. anu tajni ku bar~…ĺius, mabur~…ĺad tu. matar~…ĺaw tu bar~…ĺad ku tad…ômaw. map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu nipar~…ĺuma. tinaku a kamu mabar~…ĺad **** / mabar~…ĺad ma…ôn…ôp ku nijazu Ē~ °. mabar~…ĺadaj ***** / mabar~…ĺadaj ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maibur~…ĺ. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a fr~…ĺood is an o*…ôrfr~…ĺow of wat…ôr tńßat subm…ôrg…ôs r~…ĺand tńßat is usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj drj. tńß…ô …ôurop…ôan union fr~…ĺoods dir…ô ¶ti*…ô d…ôfin…ôs a fr~…ĺood as a ¶o*…ôriŇč bj wat…ôr of r~…ĺand not normar~…ĺr~…ĺj ¶o*…ôr…ôd bj wat…ôr. in tńß…ô s…ôns…ô of "fr~…ĺowiŇč wat…ôr", tńß…ô word maj ar~…ĺso b…ô appr~…ĺi…ôd to tńß…ô infr~…ĺow of tńß…ô tid…ô.
S.FORM: balad : śī™śįī / balad han ku tabakiay a likid nu nanum. nilacul siwkay nu balad u balad sa, u lahad a balasi'. tabaki ku nanum, matumes tu ku sa'wac. paelul tu niyazu' atu tademaw. anu maudad caay kasatezep, mabulad tu. anu tayni ku balius, mabulad tu. matalaw tu balad ku tademaw. mapeci' tu luma' atu nipaluma. tinaku a kamu mabalad śī™śįīśįĺśŅę / mabalad maenep ku niyazu'. mabaladay śī™śįīśįĺśŅęÁöĄ / mabaladay ku niyazu' nu Maibul. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika A flood is an overflow of water that submerges land that is usually dry. The European Union Floods Directive defines a flood as a covering by water of land not normally covered by water. In the sense of "flowing water", the word may also be applied to the inflow of the tide.
S.PHON: bar~…ĺad : ** / bar~…ĺad ńßan ku tabakiaj a r~…ĺikid nu nanum. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ siwkaj nu bar~…ĺad u bar~…ĺad sa, u r~…ĺańßad a bar~…ĺasi Ē~ °. tabaki ku nanum, matum…ôs tu ku sa Ē~ °wa ¶. pa…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nijazu Ē~ ° atu tad…ômaw. anu maudad ¶aaj kasat…ôz…ôp, mabur~…ĺad tu. anu tajni ku bar~…ĺius, mabur~…ĺad tu. matar~…ĺaw tu bar~…ĺad ku tad…ômaw. map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu nipar~…ĺuma. tinaku a kamu mabar~…ĺad **** / mabar~…ĺad ma…ôn…ôp ku nijazu Ē~ °. mabar~…ĺadaj ***** / mabar~…ĺadaj ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu maibur~…ĺ. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika a fr~…ĺood is an o*…ôrfr~…ĺow of wat…ôr tńßat subm…ôrg…ôs r~…ĺand tńßat is usuar~…ĺr~…ĺj drj. tńß…ô …ôurop…ôan union fr~…ĺoods dir…ô ¶ti*…ô d…ôfin…ôs a fr~…ĺood as a ¶o*…ôriŇč bj wat…ôr of r~…ĺand not normar~…ĺr~…ĺj ¶o*…ôr…ôd bj wat…ôr. in tńß…ô s…ôns…ô of "fr~…ĺowiŇč wat…ôr", tńß…ô word maj ar~…ĺso b…ô appr~…ĺi…ôd to tńß…ô infr~…ĺow of tńß…ô tid…ô.
